ast.name: error
ast.source: Please provide a valid license key
ast.target: 请提供有效的许可证密钥

ast.name: warn
ast.source: lightGallery :- If you want srcset or picture tag to be supported for older browser please include picturefil javascript library in your document.
ast.target: lightGallery :- 如果您希望旧版浏览器支持 srcset 或 picture 标签，请在文档中包含 picturefil javascript 库。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: lightGallery:- make sure lightGallery module is properly initiated
ast.target: lightGallery:- 确保 lightGallery 模块已正确初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: lightGallery:- make sure lightGallery module is properly destroyed
ast.target: lightGallery:- 确保 lightGallery 模块已正确销毁
